_publications._publicationTitle: Acceptance and commitment therapy in youth with neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) and chronic pain and their parents: A pilot study of feasibility and preliminary efficacy.

_contextSnippet: Six of the ten patients were taking less pain medication at follow-up compared to baseline; of these, three were taking fewer medications, two were taking a lower dose
details: Six of ten patients were taking less pain medication at follow-up compared to baseline
